title: Quechua Pop-Up Tent for 2 People — 2-Second Setup
short_description: Innovative pop-up tent for 2 people. Automatically unfolds in 2 seconds. Ultralight and compact — perfect for festivals and short trips.
long_description: The Quechua Pop-Up Tent revolutionizes tent setup: just throw it from the bag and it stands up by itself in two seconds. Weighing only 2 kg, it is extremely lightweight and can be stored compactly. Ideal for festivals, short trips, or as a guest tent. The waterproof coating protects against light rain.
buying_angle: Especially appealing for campers who value practical features in tents: 2-second self-setup, ultralight at 2 kg, compact storage.
